response.overview: In a house in the silent crack of time, Livramenta fulfills her domestic duties while passionately observing a mysterious boy with injured hands, both affected by the absence of pure love.
response.tagline: In a house in the silent crack of time, Livramenta fulfills her domestic duties while passionately observing a mysterious boy with injured hands, both affected by the absence of pure love.
response.title: Livramenta
